summary.zh: This patch fixes packaged Miko releases that could fail to start because a required Pi SDK module was missing.
summary.en: This patch fixes packaged Miko releases that could fail to start because a required Pi SDK module was missing.

summary.zh: Windows, macOS, and Linux server archives now include the Pi SDK modules required at startup.
summary.en: Windows, macOS, and Linux server archives now include the Pi SDK modules required at startup.

sources.title: fix: package Pi SDK runtime in server archives
